category_sources: source_facts.description says it exports RCS or CVS history as a fast-import stream; official GitLab repo describes cvs-fast-export as that project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cvs-fast-export; official repository title is cvs-fast-export.
docs_sources: Official homepage is source_facts.homepage and lists README/documentation resources; official GitLab repository contains README.adoc.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/esr/cvs-fast-export, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI for CVS/RCS fast-import export; official project name confirms CVS migration purpose.
